title: English's Peanuts 5LTub Premium Bird Food - High Protein Peanuts for Wild Birds, Rich in Healthy Fats, Fibre & Vitamins, Ideal for Feeders, Supports Bird Health, Clean & Fresh Wild Bird Food
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: PREMIUM QUALITY PEANUTS: These premium peanuts for wild birds are a nutritious addition to any bird feed mix. Packed with protein and healthy fats, they support the health of wild birds and are also ideal as squirrel food and monkey nuts. Clean, fresh, and unsalted—perfect for all-year feeding.

RICH IN PROTEIN & HEALTHY FATS: Specially selected for their high protein and 40–50% healthy fat content, these bird peanuts provide energy for small garden birds. Whether used as bird food, squirrel food, or fox food, they support growth, feather condition, and overall vitality.

IDEAL FOR FEEDERS & SAFE FOR YOUNG BIRDS: These peanuts for birds are perfect for use in mesh bird feeders, requiring birds to peck pieces, helping prevent choking. Safe for young or small birds, they also make excellent bird feed and are loved by tits, sparrows, and finches.

NATURALLY ENERGY-RICH & EASY TO STORE: Unsalted and rich in natural energy, these wild bird peanuts help sustain birds through cold months and busy breeding seasons. Easy to store and use, they’re a great choice for bird food enthusiasts and garden wildlife lovers alike.

MULTIPLE PACK SIZES – SAME GREAT NUTRITION: Available in a range of sizes, every pack of English’s Peanuts offers the same consistent quality and nutrition. Whether you're buying in bulk or topping up your bird seed mix, these bird peanuts deliver the same trusted freshness and taste.
description: Product Description Fill Your Garden with the Joy of Birds Bring your outdoor space to life with our nutrient-rich peanuts—specially selected to attract, nourish, and delight a wide variety of wild birds, turning your garden into a vibrant sanctuary. Easy to Feed, Perfect for Bird Feeders Our premium peanuts are ideal for mesh feeders, making feeding clean, simple, and mess-free. Designed for convenience and safety, they help birds enjoy every bite while keeping your garden tidy. Feed Small, Keep It Fresh For the best quality and bird health, offer only enough peanuts for a day or two. Feeding little and often ensures freshness, reduces waste, and keeps mould away.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎High Protein, Premium Quality, Feeder-Friendly, Safe for Young Birds
